name: fuse-design
description: Design Director for complete apps, sites, and SaaS. Multi-stack support (React/shadcn, Laravel/Livewire Flux, Swift/SwiftUI). Identity System, page layouts, motion system, palette generator, design audit. Anti-AI-Slop, WCAG 2.2, Gemini Design MCP.
